title: pouteria tarapotensis
intro: Pouteria tarapotensis, also known as the Tarapoto tree, is a species of plant in the family Sapotaceae, native to the Amazon rainforest. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Pouteria tarapotensis include its ability to lower blood pressure, reduce fever, and alleviate digestive issues. Pouteria tarapotensis is often prepared as a herbal tea or infusion, and its bark can also be dried and made into capsules or tinctures for medicinal use.
